generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensorInside1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer inside the thermal incubator box"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensorInside2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer inside the thermal incubator box"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensorOutside : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer outside the thermal incubator box"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorInside1, TemperatureSensorInside2, TemperatureSensorOutside
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModelPredictionEnabler, ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with two parameters: C_air, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool, ThermalModelPredictionEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with four parameters: C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool, ThermalModelPredictionEnabler
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214 × 214 × 3 mm heatbed actuated via Raspberry Pi GPIO through MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with airflow 0.02 m³/s actuated via Raspberry Pi GPIO through MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance InsulatedBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated box with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system management"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuator control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance ScipyCalibrationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for non-linear least squares optimization of thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker facilitating data transfer between physical and digital twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance ThermalModelPredictionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based thermal model execution for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, SystemMonitoringService, ThermalOptimizationService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predicts temperature using calibrated thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance SystemMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors system safety and optimal performance in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, OptimalPerformanceInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults in the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimates system state using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance ThermalOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes thermal regulation based on simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalOptimizationInsight, AdjustHeatbedPower, AdjustFanSpeed
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibrates thermal models using Scipy non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transmits sensor data between physical and digital twins via RabbitMQ"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from thermal models"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety parameters"
]

instance OptimalPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system performance for optimal operation"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected faults in the thermal system"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated system state based on sensor data and models"
]

instance ThermalOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized thermal regulation settings based on simulations"
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibration results of thermal models using experimental data"
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data transmission status between physical and digital twins"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedPower : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust heatbed power level based on simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust fan speed based on simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains InsulatedBox, RaspberryPi4, PCB, PowerSupply, Heatbed, Fan, TemperatureSensorInside1, TemperatureSensorInside2, TemperatureSensorOutside
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) are sent from the digital twin via RabbitMQ to the controller, which executes them through the low-level driver to actuate the heatbed and fan."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via RabbitMQ server on Raspberry Pi connecting the controller (physical side), low-level driver, and digital twin components, with information flow between physical and virtual layers through RabbitMQ topics."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated by testing Assumption 1 (temperature uniformity) using multiple sensors, and calibration via residual error minimization between predicted and experimental data trajectories."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "DT technical connection uses RabbitMQ as the communication broker between physical and virtual components, with no specific protocol details provided in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and digital twin components hosted on the Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with all software deployed on-premises."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety during operation, but specific details on cybersecurity or human safety risks from remote operations are not provided."
]
